title: The Tanglewoods
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Tanglewoods''' were a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] in [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. It was south of [[Ussa]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] had trouble maintaining patrols there. Because of that, [[the Eleven]] kept a secret route functional through the wood to Ussa, using holographic displays to hide it.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
